title: arabis gerardi subsp. longisiliqua
intro: Arabis gerardi subsp. longisiliqua, also known as the long-fruited rock-cress, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Brassicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Arabis gerardi subsp. longisiliqua include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infused oil, and it is also used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties.
